notes: Gemini h2_mode=1 re-test: BLOCKED but NO visible warning. Same cascade failure pattern as h2_mode=2 (#285). ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR on POST BardChatUi/data/batchexecute. New observation: CSP violation detected — APF may have injected content that violates Gemini's Content Security Policy (connect-src directive). CSP report POST also failed with ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR. Page stuck in loading state with blue spinner. h2_mode=1 (GOAWAY) does NOT improve the situation for Gemini — the fundamental problem is that the H2 connection disruption happens before warning content can be delivered through the protobuf-like response format.
